# Prediction in Simple Linear Regression {prediction-simple-regression}

```{r prediction-simple-regression-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/prediction-simple-regression-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/prediction-simple-regression/"
)
```

```{r child-prediction-simple-regression, child="../lecture-content/08-prediction-simple-regression.Rmd"}
```
